dc_description: A daytime road scene photographed from a cyclist's perspective, with bicycle handlebars and a small device visible at the bottom foreground. A two-lane paved road stretches into the distance under a clear blue sky. Dense green hedges and fence posts line the left side, while taller shrubs and leafless tree branches border the right shoulder. Dry grass borders both sides of the road, and a partially visible roadside sign appears on the right edge.
novel_visual_observations: Several dark circular spots are visible in the sky area, likely lens or sensor dust. The road has a center dividing line and white edge markings, with no vehicles or pedestrians visible.
location_name: Via Formellese, Municipio Roma XV, Roma
rich_context: Via Formellese, Municipio Roma XV, Roma, Roma Capitale, Lazio, Italia
